Module com.example._0tazo
Package com.example._0tazo.model.exception

Class GameException.SumExceededException

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Throwable
java.lang.Exception
com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException
com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.SumExceededException
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
GameException
public static class GameException.SumExceededException extends GameException
Thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would cause the table sum to exceed 50, violating the main rule of Cincuentazo.

Example:


 if (!card.isPlayable(currentSum)) {
     throw new GameException.SumExceededException(currentSum, card.getValue(currentSum));
 }
See Also:

    • SumExceededException

      public SumExceededException(int currentSum, int cardValue)
      Constructs a SumExceededException with context about the card and the current table sum.
      Parameters:
      currentSum - the table sum before the illegal play
      cardValue - the value the card would have contributed
